rationale: The citing paper is about yes/no response formats in non-forced email choice architecture, while the cited paper is about effectiveness-signaling cues reducing postpurchase usage; they share a possible high-level link on downstream behavior beyond initial choice but use different constructs and contexts. Because the matched evidence is only a DOI-level match (no in-text citation context or excerpt), there isn’t enough evidence to confidently classify this as clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
